_comment: Entity-resolution confidence weights. Loaded at runtime by app/resolution/config.py --
NOT hardcoded in Python (Phase 3 brief SS7). Override the file path with
RESOLUTION_WEIGHTS_PATH, or edit these values and restart.
These are EXPERT-SET STARTING VALUES, not statistically calibrated ones.
docs/phase-0-dataset-audit.md SS14 established that this dataset cannot support real
calibration (client names resolve to nothing in the authoritative lists; only 60 clients
carry behavioural ground truth). Presenting them as fitted would be a lie. They encode a
deliberate compliance posture: name similarity alone can never reach high confidence --
corroborating attributes must carry it there, and conflicts must be able to sink it.
positive_weights: max points a scorer contributes at score=1.0.
conflict_penalties: points SUBTRACTED when a scorer detects a genuine contradiction.
Penalties intentionally exceed most single positive weights: a confirmed DOB or
entity-type contradiction should defeat a strong name match, which is exactly the
false-positive class Phase 0 found in this data (AL-RASHID TRUST vs Mohammad Al-Rashid).
